name: Ganas Ya - Fort Worth
description_short: Ganas Ya (Fort Worth) was a Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership offering in-house auto financing with minimal credit requirements. The Fort Worth location has since closed.
description_long:
Ganas Ya is a Texas-based Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) used car dealership chain operating under the Tricolor Auto brand. The Fort Worth location at 4450 S Freeway served the local community as part of a regional network of dealerships across Texas, targeting primarily Spanish-speaking and underserved consumers who may face difficulty qualifying for traditional auto financing. The company's branding—including the tagline 'El Mero Mero'—reflects a deliberate focus on the Hispanic market.

The core offering was in-house auto financing bundled with used car sales. Ganas Ya advertised 'direct financing with minimal requirements,' accepting applicants with limited or damaged credit as long as the vehicle title was clean. Each vehicle underwent a 150-point inspection and came with a limited warranty of up to one month on selected units. The dealership also offered add-on services including automotive insurance and an on-site service department, making it a one-stop shop for vehicle acquisition and basic ownership needs.

What set Ganas Ya apart from independent BHPH lots was the institutional backing of Tricolor, a larger auto finance operation. The Fort Worth location had multiple service verticals—Sales, Insurance, Customer Relations, and Automotive Service—each with separate operating hours. A military discount program ($800 off the purchase price) was available for active-duty, reserve, and recently separated veterans, though terms were specific to Fort Hood-area personnel and immediate household family members.

Importantly, as of the date of this profile, Ganas Ya has ceased offering financing and vehicle sales entirely. The website states: 'We are no longer offering financing or sales services.' Existing customers with payment obligations are directed to contact Tricolor at Tricolor@acct-admin.com or 888-448-7426. Those in financial hardship may qualify for a loan modification called 'Fresh Start.' Consumers searching for active BHPH or subprime auto financing in Fort Worth should look elsewhere.
pros: In-house financing with stated 'minimal requirements'—accessible to borrowers turned down by banks or credit unions
Every vehicle undergoes a 150-point inspection before sale
Limited warranty included on selected vehicles (up to 1 month)
Military discount of $800 applied to vehicle purchase price
Multiple contact channels: SMS, WhatsApp, and live web chat
Part of Tricolor, a larger institutional operator with a structured customer relations team
cons: CLOSED: No longer accepting new financing applications or vehicle sales as of this profile
BHPH financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto loans—rates were not disclosed on the website
Limited warranty covers only up to 1 month, leaving buyers exposed after a short window
Military discount restricted to Fort Hood-area personnel only—not available to all military consumers
No self-service account management mentioned; payment and account issues require contacting a third-party servicer (Tricolor)
best_for: Subprime borrowers who were previously unable to qualify for traditional auto financing (note: now closed)
Spanish-speaking consumers in the Fort Worth area seeking a bilingual dealership experience
Existing Ganas Ya customers needing payment assistance or loan modification through the Fresh Start program
Military families near Fort Hood who qualified for the $800 purchase discount
diagnosis: Ganas Ya Fort Worth was a subprime BHPH auto dealer best suited for consumers with poor or no credit who needed a vehicle and in-house financing in one place. The main caveat is that this location is no longer operating—anyone seeking new financing should contact Tricolor directly or find an alternative lender, and existing customers should use the Fresh Start program if facing payment difficulty.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Limited vehicle warranty (up to 1 month on selected units)
Military discount program ($800 off vehicle purchase price)
Fresh Start loan modification for existing borrowers in hardship
